content: We can frame Self-Refine’s iterative un supervised self-improvement workflow as a base to resolve a key limitation of existing LLM self-reflection mechanisms: single-perspective feedback bias. By integrating multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection research into Self-Refine’s iteration loop, we can create a multi-perspective Self-Refine framework that retains the original method’s core advantage of no extra training or labeled data while improving refinement quality.
